4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","viewer","competition-track-requirements-2026",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["viewer",{"children":[["slug","competition-track-requirements-2026","c",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/11fii1qfatvp_.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/00~a4cfihy7j3.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wi11rh25l7c_.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0shhd6kjmka31.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0f6kvf~_~fcr7.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01v-109x2_k5o.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i.l9589uvx0j.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0is5p.edcm0hi.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0v5jhj7c24q78.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0j4pbljnny6-v.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable surfaces"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-7",{"children":["$","p","p-28",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"PrivateDAO is being advanced toward honest mainnet-ready status through an active closure program. The current operating milestones are:"}]}],["$","$1","block-8",{"children":["$","ul","l-37",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-37-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"external audit completion"}],["$","li","l-37-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"authority multisig and custody hardening closure"}],["$","li","l-37-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"production monitoring and alerting closure"}],["$","li","l-37-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"full real-device wallet runtime matrix"}],["$","li","l-37-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"source-verifiable settlement receipts for the confidential operations corridor"}],["$","li","l-37-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"final mainnet cutover ceremony"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-9",{"children":["$","p","p-38",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Primary blocker sources:"}]}],["$","$1","block-10",{"children":["$","ul","l-43",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-43-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/mainnet-blockers.json`"}],["$","li","l-43-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`docs/mainnet-go-live-checklist.md`"}]]}]}],"$L23","$L24","$L25","$L26","$L27","$L28","$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c","$L3d","$L3e","$L3f","$L40","$L41","$L42","$L43","$L44","$L45","$L46","$L47","$L48","$L49","$L4a","$L4b"]}]}]}]
23:["$","$1","block-11",{"children":["$","h2","h2-46",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Evaluation method"}]}]
24:["$","$1","block-12",{"children":["$","p","p-49",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"For this public note:"}]}]
25:["$","$1","block-13",{"children":["$","ul","l-55",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-55-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"**verified alignment** means “mapped to a shipped surface or an explicit next milestone already present in the repo”"}],["$","li","l-55-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"**public fit** means “described in technical and product terms that a reviewer can verify”"}],["$","li","l-55-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"**private submission tactics** stay outside the repo"}]]}]}]
26:["$","$1","block-14",{"children":["$","h2","h2-58",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Public alignment matrix"}]}]
4c:T484,| Product lens | What the current cycle rewards | PrivateDAO fit now | Highest-value next step | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | Product coherence | One clear product, not stacked demos | Very strong | keep `/start`, `/services`, `/trust`, and `/story` aligned | | Wallet-first governance | Clean path from connect wallet to real action | Strong | finish first-run smoothing and browser-wallet closure | | Privacy as workflow value | Confidential behavior that improves a real operation | Strong | keep encrypted operations and settlement evidence easier to review | | Telemetry and infrastructure | Analytics, diagnostics, and operator trust | Strong | keep export surfaces and infrastructure readability improving | | Treasury motion and payments | Clear asset movement, payout, and business-readable execution | Emerging to strong | keep the governed treasury route more executable | | Audit-readiness | Hardening discipline and reviewer clarity | Strong | keep trust, runtime evidence, and audit packet aligned | | Company-grade maturity | Product seriousness, not only technical novelty | Strong | keep the company and product story concise and grounded |27:["$","$1","block-15",{"children":["$","p","p-61",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"$4c"}]}]
28:["$","$1","block-16",{"children":["$","h2","h2-65",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"Highest-value track-to-service mapping"}]}]

4b:["$","$1","block-51",{"children":["$","p","p-200",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"The team is working continuously to turn every technical layer into something stronger, easier to explain, and more useful to the ecosystem. The goal is not only to perform well during the current cycle, but to convert support into a longer mission: helping shape stronger governance, stronger operational safety, and stronger privacy-aware infrastructure for the ecosystem over time."}]}]
